privacyDescription.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow camera access to capture photos and videos.
privacyDescription.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow microphone access to record video audio.
privacyDescription.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Photos access to save captured photos and videos automatically.
privacyDescription.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Photos access to save captured photos and videos automatically.
